body:
Lever V2.0 - Minecraft AI Agent with Physical Tool Calls

Core Features:
- 8 Physical Tool Calls (look_at/walk_to/mine_block/place_block/use_item/jump/sneak/get_position)
- BotActionController: server-side tick-based physics simulation
- DummyClientConnection: zero-NPE fake-player network handler
- Bot Summoner item with crafting recipe
- Multi-modal dynamic capability negotiation
- @BotName chat commands + /bot management

Performance Fixes:
- BotEntity NPE crash resolved (DummyClientConnection)
- OpenGL context violation fixed
- Main thread lag eliminated
- ABGR->ARGB pixel channel swap fix

Security:
- CommandSafety: 50+ blocked commands, 5 allowlisted
- PermissionManager 3-tier access control
- BotManager ConcurrentHashMap atomic ops
- API Key persistence with .bak backup

135/135 tests passing
name: Lever V2.0
